title: Epic_Fight_X_SimplySwords
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the SimplySwords weapons
body:
I animated some of the weapons in the SimplySwords mod for the Epic fight mod

- Note!!! Required Items:
1. Epic Fight:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
2. SimplySwords:[https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
3. Weapons of miracles:[https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles)
